digest.component_or_area: mutation-testing shards for concurrency decision logic
propositions: Mutation testing currently covers only five behavioral cores and has no mutation evidence for the concurrency machinery.
Narrow mutation shards should target pure decision logic for compaction fold/rollback, remote-append, and push once their behavioral tests land.
Small pure decision helpers should be extracted where needed instead of mutating whole subprocess-heavy orchestration modules.
Sync branch selection and lock stale-owner/reclamation are descoped unless this story also adds their behavioral tests.
Mapped mutation scores for new shards must be recorded and the story scheduled after prerequisite stories S1/S3/S4.
